docs.title: Uniasset
docs.text:
1

C# SDK

完全异步的 C# API 层，提供 ImageAsset、AudioAsset 等高级抽象。

2

P/Invoke FFI

轻量级跨语言调用层，C# 通过平台调用直接与原生库交互，零中间层、零序列化开销。

3

Rust 原生库

高性能 Rust 核心，负责编解码、数据处理与内存管理。编译为各平台原生二进制，安全且高效。

加载并处理图片

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
await image.LoadAsync("photo.png");

// 裁剪 & 缩放
await image.CropAsync(0, 0, 256, 256);
await image.ResizeAsync(128, 128);

// 转换为 Texture2D
Texture2D texture = await image.ToTexture2DAsync();

加载并播放音频

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");

// 获取音频信息
Debug.Log($"采样率: {audio.SampleRate} Hz");
Debug.Log($"声道数: {audio.ChannelCount}");

// 转换为 AudioClip 播放
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: Uniasset
docs.text:
高性能 Unity 外部资源加载插件

基于 Rust 原生库，为 Unity 提供异步、高效的外部图片与音频加载能力。

快速开始 GitHub

MIT C# + Rust

docs.title: Unity 资源加载的痛点
docs.text: 在 Unity 项目开发中，外部资源加载往往会遇到很多问题。Uniasset 专为解决这些痛点而生。

docs.title: 执行效率低
docs.text: 若需要对 Texture 进行缩放裁切，需要自行 SetPixels，经过多轮复制、转换。

docs.title: 格式支持有限
docs.text: Unity 原生支持的格式不足，处理 WebP、FLAC 等格式需要额外方案。

docs.title: 缺乏灵活的数据源
docs.text: 无法方便地从网络流、加密包或自定义存储层加载资源。

docs.title: 极致性能
docs.text: 底层由 Rust 编写，通过 P/Invoke FFI 直接调用原生代码，充分利用 SIMD 等加速。

docs.title: 异步优先
docs.text: 所有耗时操作均提供 async/await 异步 API，天然适配 Unity 的协程与 Task 体系，告别主线程阻塞。

docs.title: 多格式图片
docs.text: 支持 JPEG、WebP、PNG、BMP、TGA、PSD，内置裁剪、缩放等图像处理方法。

docs.title: 多格式音频
docs.text: 覆盖 MP3、FLAC、WAV、PCM、Vorbis、OGG、AAC 七种音频格式。

docs.title: 自定义数据源
docs.text: 实现 IUniassetStream 接口，即可从任意来源加载资源 — 网络流、加密包、AssetBundle、内存缓存。

docs.title: 一键集成
docs.text: 下载 Release 中的 uniasset-unity-scripts.zip，再通过编辑器菜单下载并配置原生库。

docs.title: 图片
docs.text:
• JPEG
  • WebP (仅首帧)
  • PNG
  • BMP
  • TGA
  • PSD
  • GIF (仅首帧)

docs.title: 音频
docs.text:
• MP3
  • FLAC
  • WAV
  • Vorbis (OGG)
  • AAC

docs.title: 安装包
docs.text: 下载 Release 中的 uniasset-unity-scripts.zip，解压到项目目录中。

docs.title: 安装原生库
docs.text:
在 Unity Editor 中依次点击以下菜单：

Tools > Uniasset > Download Native Libraries
Tools > Uniasset > Configure Native Libraries

docs.title: 开始使用
docs.text:
在脚本顶部添加命名空间引用后，即可开始加载资源：

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
await image.LoadAsync("assets/photo.png");

docs.title: 安装
docs.text:
唯一的安装方式：

  1. 下载 Release 中的 uniasset-unity-scripts.zip
  2. 解压到项目目录中
  3. 在 Unity Editor 中，依次点击 Tools > Uniasset > Download Native Libraries
  4. 下载完成后，依次点击 Tools > Uniasset > Configure Native Libraries

docs.title: 加载图片
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

// 创建 ImageAsset 实例
var image = new ImageAsset();

// 从文件加载
image.Load("path/to/image.png");

// 获取图片信息
Debug.Log($"尺寸: {image.Width} x {image.Height}");
Debug.Log($"通道数: {image.ChannelCount}");

// 转换为 Unity Texture2D
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

// 用完后释放资源
image.Dispose();

docs.title: 加载音频
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

// 创建 AudioAsset 实例
var audio = new AudioAsset();

// 从文件加载
audio.Load("path/to/audio.mp3");

// 获取音频信息
Debug.Log($"采样率: {audio.SampleRate}");
Debug.Log($"通道数: {audio.ChannelCount}");
Debug.Log($"总帧数: {audio.FrameCount}");

// 转换为 Unity AudioClip
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

// 用完后释放资源
audio.Dispose();

docs.title: 异步加载
docs.text:
所有耗时操作都提供了异步版本，避免阻塞主线程：

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

var image = new ImageAsset();

// 异步加载图片
await image.LoadAsync("path/to/image.png");

// 异步裁剪
await image.CropAsync(0, 0, 100, 100);

// 异步缩放
await image.ResizeAsync(200, 200);

// 异步转换为 Texture2D
Texture2D texture = await image.ToTexture2DAsync();

image.Dispose();

docs.title: API 参考
docs.text: 本节基于 Unity/Uniasset/ 中当前公开的 C# API 编写，只包含高层封装，不包含 Unsafe / Interop 相关类型。

docs.title: 命名空间概览
docs.text: 命名空间 说明 Uniasset 核心流接口与适配器 Uniasset.Image 图片相关类型 Uniasset.Audio 音频相关类型

docs.title: ImageAsset
docs.text:
图片资源类，支持从文件、内存或流加载编码后的图片数据，并提供裁剪、缩放、克隆与 Texture2D 转换能力。

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: AudioAsset
docs.text:
音频资源类，支持从文件、内存或自定义流加载音频，并提供 PCM 读取、定位和 AudioClip 转换能力。

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: CropOptions
docs.text:
裁剪区域描述结构体，用于批量裁剪操作。

var crops = new CropOptions[]
{
    new CropOptions(0, 0, 100, 100),
    new CropOptions(100, 0, 100, 100),
};
ImageAsset[] results = image.CropMultiple(crops);

docs.title: ResizeFilter
docs.text:
缩放滤波算法枚举，支持 Nearest、Box、Lanczos3、Gaussian。

image.Resize(256, 256, ResizeFilter.Lanczos3);

docs.title: PixelType
docs.text:
像素格式枚举，用于判断图片的通道排列方式。

if (image.PixelType == PixelType.RGBA) { ... }

docs.title: SampleFormat
docs.text: 音频解码时使用的采样格式枚举，支持 Float 和 Int16。

docs.title: IUniassetStream
docs.text:
自定义流接口。

public interface IUniassetStream
{
    int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
    long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
}

docs.title: StreamWrapper
docs.text: System.IO.Stream 到 IUniassetStream 的适配器。

docs.title: 同步加载
docs.text:
using var asset = new ImageAsset();
asset.Load("path/to/file.png");

docs.title: 异步加载
docs.text:
using var asset = new ImageAsset();
await asset.LoadAsync("path/to/file.png");

docs.title: 释放资源
docs.text:
ImageAsset 和 AudioAsset 都实现了 IDisposable，使用完成后应及时释放：

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.text: Uniasset.Audio.AudioAsset 是音频资源的高层封装，支持加载、顺序读取 PCM 数据、随机定位以及转换为 Unity AudioClip。

{
    public sealed class AudioAsset : IDisposable { }
}

docs.text:
属性 类型 说明 SampleRate int 采样率，例如 44100 SampleCount long 总采样点数 ChannelCount int 声道数 FrameCount long 总帧数

对多声道音频有：

SampleCount == FrameCount * ChannelCount

docs.title: Load
docs.text:
public void Load(string path, SampleFormat sampleFormat = SampleFormat.Float)

从文件路径加载音频。

参数 类型 默认值 说明 path string — 音频文件路径 sampleFormat SampleFormat Float 解码输出的采样格式 
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");

docs.title:
LoadIO 
public void LoadIO(IUniassetStream stream, SampleFormat sampleFormat = SampleFormat.Float)

从自定义流加载音频。

stream 为 null 时会抛出 ArgumentNullException。

Note

当前 AudioAsset 不提供 LoadAsync(...) 系列重载，也不提供 LoadIO(Stream) 便捷重载。

SeekUnsafe 
public void SeekUnsafe(long position)

跳转到指定帧位置。

线程安全性

该函数不保证线程安全，应在只有单个线程会访问该资源的场景中使用。多线程场景请使用 Seek 方法。

参数 类型 说明 position long 目标帧位置

该方法与 Seek 功能相同，但跳过内部同步机制以提升性能。仅在确认不存在并发访问时使用。

// 单线程场景下的使用示例
audio.SeekUnsafe(1000);

Unload 
public void Unload()

卸载已加载的音频数据。卸载后可以重新调用 Load 方法加载新音频。

Dispose 
public void Dispose()

释放底层资源。释放后不应继续使用该实例。
CropOptions
docs.text: Uniasset.Image.CropOptions 用于描述一个裁剪矩形，主要配合 ImageAsset.CropMultiple(...) 使用。

docs.title: 结构体定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Image
{
    public struct CropOptions
    {
        public uint X;
        public uint Y;
        public uint Width;
        public uint Height;

        public CropOptions(int x, int y, int width, int height);
    }
}

docs.title: 字段
docs.text: 字段 类型 说明 X uint 左上角 X 坐标 Y uint 左上角 Y 坐标 Width uint 裁剪宽度 Height uint 裁剪高度

docs.title: 构造函数
docs.text:
public CropOptions(int x, int y, int width, int height)

使用 checked 算术创建实例，确保值不为负数。

参数 类型 说明 x int 左边界坐标 y int 上边界坐标 width int 裁剪宽度 height int 裁剪高度

如果任一参数为负数，将抛出 OverflowException。

docs.text:
using Uniasset.Image;

var crops = new CropOptions[]
{
    new CropOptions(0, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(32, 0, 32, 32),

Note

IUniassetStream
docs.text: Uniasset.IUniassetStream 用于抽象可读取、可定位的数据源。ImageAsset.LoadIO(...) 和 AudioAsset.LoadIO(...) 都依赖该接口。

docs.title: 接口定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset
{
    public interface IUniassetStream
    {
        int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
        long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
    }
}

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
int Read(Span<byte> buffer);

从流中读取数据到缓冲区。

参数 类型 说明 buffer Span<byte> 目标缓冲区

返回实际读取的字节数；返回 0 表示已到达流末尾。

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);

移动流的读取位置。

参数 类型 说明 offset long 偏移量 origin SeekOrigin 偏移起点

返回新的流位置。

docs.title: SeekOrigin
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset
{
    public enum SeekOrigin
    {
        Begin = 0,
        Current = 1,
        End = 2
    }
}
成员 值 说明 Begin 0 从流开头计算偏移 Current 1 从当前位置计算偏移 End 2 从流末尾计算偏移

docs.title: 自定义实现
docs.text:
你可以实现 IUniassetStream 来接入内存数据、打包资源或其他自定义存储：

public class MemoryStreamAdapter : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public MemoryStreamAdapter(byte[] data)
    {
        _data = data;
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        _position = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => (int)offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + (int)offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + (int)offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: 说明
docs.text:
• ImageAsset 同时提供 LoadIO(IUniassetStream) 和 LoadIO(Stream)。
  • AudioAsset 只提供 LoadIO(IUniassetStream)。
  • 自定义实现必须同时支持顺序读取和随机定位。

docs.title: PixelType
docs.text: Uniasset.Image.PixelType 枚举表示图片的像素格式。

docs.title: 定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Image
{
    public enum PixelType : uint
    {
        Unknown = 0,
        RGBA = 1,
        ARGB = 2,
        RGB = 3,
        Grey = 4,
    }
}

docs.title: 成员
docs.text: 成员 值 通道数 Unknown 0 0 RGBA 1 4 ARGB 2 4 RGB 3 3 Grey 4 1

docs.title: 使用
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");

if (image.PixelType == PixelType.RGBA)
{
    Debug.Log("图片包含 alpha 通道");
}

通过 ImageAsset.ChannelCount 属性可直接获取通道数，无需手动映射。

docs.title: ResizeFilter
docs.text: Uniasset.Image.ResizeFilter 枚举指定缩放图片时使用的滤波算法。

docs.title: 定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Image
{
    public enum ResizeFilter : uint
    {
        Nearest = 0,
        Box = 1,
        Lanczos3 = 2,
        Gaussian = 3,
    }
}

docs.title: 成员
docs.text: 成员 值 说明 Nearest 0 最近邻插值，速度最快，适合像素风格 Box 1 盒式滤波，适合缩小 Lanczos3 2 Lanczos 3-lobe 插值，质量最高 Gaussian 3 高斯滤波，平滑效果

docs.title: 使用
docs.text:
image.Resize(256, 256, ResizeFilter.Lanczos3);

不指定 ResizeFilter 时默认使用 Nearest。

docs.title: SampleFormat
docs.text: Uniasset.Audio.SampleFormat 用于指定音频解码后的样本格式。

docs.title: 枚举定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Audio
{
    public enum SampleFormat : byte
    {
        Float = 0,
        Int16 = 1
    }
}

docs.title: 成员
docs.text: 成员 值 说明 Float 0 32 位浮点格式，对应 Read<float>(...) Int16 1 16 位整数格式，对应 Read<short>(...)

docs.title: 使用示例
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio1 = new AudioAsset();
audio1.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);
float[] floatBuffer = new float[1024];
audio1.Read<float>(floatBuffer, 1024);

using var audio2 = new AudioAsset();
audio2.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Int16);
short[] shortBuffer = new short[1024];
audio2.Read<short>(shortBuffer, 1024);

docs.title: 选择建议
docs.text: 场景 推荐格式 通用场景 Float 内存受限 Int16 需要音频处理 Float 直接处理整数 PCM Int16

docs.title: StreamWrapper
docs.text: Uniasset.StreamWrapper 是 IUniassetStream 的内置实现，用于将 System.IO.Stream 适配为 IUniassetStream。

docs.title: 类定义
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset
{
    public sealed class StreamWrapper : IUniassetStream
    {
        public StreamWrapper(Stream stream);
        public int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
        public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
    }
}

docs.title: 构造函数
docs.text:
public StreamWrapper(Stream stream)
参数 类型 说明 stream Stream 要包装的流，必须可读且可定位

当 stream 为 null 时会抛出 ArgumentNullException；不可读或不可定位时会抛出 ArgumentException。

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)

从底层 Stream 读取数据。

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)

将 Uniasset 的 SeekOrigin 转换为 System.IO.SeekOrigin 并执行定位。

docs.title: 手动包装 Stream
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(wrapper);

docs.title: 配合 AudioAsset 使用
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(wrapper);

ImageAsset 的便捷重载

ImageAsset.LoadIO(Stream) 会在内部自动创建 StreamWrapper，因此图片加载时可以直接传入 System.IO.Stream：

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
image.LoadIO(fileStream);

docs.title: 适用场景
docs.text:
• 你已经拿到一个 FileStream、MemoryStream 或其他 .NET Stream
  • 希望复用现有 Stream 逻辑，而不是手写 IUniassetStream
  • 需要把标准 .NET 流接入 AudioAsset.LoadIO(...)

docs.title: 音频加载指南
docs.text: 本指南介绍如何使用 Uniasset.Audio.AudioAsset 加载音频、读取 PCM 数据并转换为 Unity AudioClip。

docs.title: 支持格式
docs.text:
Uniasset 当前支持以下音频格式：

格式 扩展名 说明 MP3 .mp3 常见有损压缩格式 FLAC .flac 无损压缩格式 WAV .wav 常见未压缩容器 PCM .pcm 原始 PCM 数据 Vorbis — Vorbis 编码音频 OGG .ogg 常见 Vorbis 容器 AAC .aac, .m4a 常见有损压缩格式

docs.title: 从文件加载
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("Assets/Audio/bgm.mp3");

Debug.Log($"采样率: {audio.SampleRate} Hz");
Debug.Log($"声道数: {audio.ChannelCount}");
Debug.Log($"总帧数: {audio.FrameCount}");

docs.title: 从字节数组加载
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();

byte[] data = File.ReadAllBytes("sound.wav");
audio.Load(data);

docs.title: 从自定义流加载
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");
var stream = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

audio.LoadIO(stream);

Note

当前 AudioAsset 只提供 LoadIO(IUniassetStream)，没有 LoadIO(Stream) 便捷重载。

docs.title: 采样格式
docs.text:
加载音频时可以指定输出采样格式：

audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);
audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Int16);

一般建议：

  • 需要直接交给 Unity 或做浮点处理时使用 SampleFormat.Float
  • 想降低内存占用或直接处理 16 位 PCM 时使用 SampleFormat.Int16

详见 SampleFormat API 参考。

docs.title: 流式播放
docs.text:
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip("BGM", stream: true);
audioSource.clip = clip;
audioSource.Play();

适合：

  • 背景音乐
  • 长时音频
  • 希望降低一次性内存占用的场景

docs.title: 全量加载
docs.text:
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip("Explosion", stream: false);

适合：

  • 短音效
  • 需要频繁重复播放的片段

docs.title: 手动读取 PCM 数据
基本读取
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.flac", SampleFormat.Float);

float[] buffer = new float[1024 * audio.ChannelCount];
int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, 1024);

docs.title: 逐块读取整个文件
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);

int chunkSize = 4096;
float[] buffer = new float[chunkSize * audio.ChannelCount];
long totalFrames = 0;

while (true)
{
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, chunkSize);
    if (framesRead == 0) break;

    totalFrames += framesRead;
}

Debug.Log($"总共读取 {totalFrames} 帧");

docs.title: 使用 Int16 格式
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("sound.wav", SampleFormat.Int16);

short[] buffer = new short[1024 * audio.ChannelCount];
int framesRead = audio.Read<short>(buffer, 1024);

Warning

Read<T>(...) 中的 T 必须与加载时使用的 SampleFormat 对应： SampleFormat.Float -> float，SampleFormat.Int16 -> short。

docs.title: 获取当前位置
docs.text:
long currentFrame = audio.Tell();
Debug.Log($"当前帧: {currentFrame} / {audio.FrameCount}");

docs.title: 跳转到指定帧
docs.text:
audio.Seek(1000);
audio.Seek(0);

docs.title: 秒数与帧数换算
docs.text:
float seconds = (float)audio.Tell() / audio.SampleRate;

long frame = (long)(10.5f * audio.SampleRate);
audio.Seek(frame);

docs.title: 使用 using
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: 卸载已加载数据
docs.text:
audio.Unload();

Unload() 会清空当前音频内容，但对象本身仍可继续复用。

docs.title: 背景音乐播放器
docs.text:
public class BGMPlayer : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private AudioSource _audioSource;

    private AudioAsset _audioAsset;

    public void PlayBGM(string path)
    {
        StopBGM();

        _audioAsset = new AudioAsset();
        _audioAsset.Load(path);

        _audioSource.clip = _audioAsset.ToAudioClip("BGM", stream: true);
        _audioSource.loop = true;
        _audioSource.Play();
    }

    public void StopBGM()
    {
        _audioSource.Stop();
        _audioSource.clip = null;
        _audioAsset?.Dispose();
        _audioAsset = null;
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        StopBGM();
    }
}

docs.title: 音效缓存
docs.text:
public class SFXManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    private readonly Dictionary<string, AudioClip> _cache = new();

    public AudioClip LoadSFX(string path)
    {
        if (_cache.TryGetValue(path, out var cached))
            return cached;

        using var audio = new AudioAsset();
        audio.Load(path);

        var clip = audio.ToAudioClip(Path.GetFileName(path), stream: false);
        _cache[path] = clip;
        return clip;
    }
}

docs.title: 波形预览
docs.text:
public float[] ReadWaveform(string path, int frameCount)
{
    using var audio = new AudioAsset();
    audio.Load(path, SampleFormat.Float);

    float[] samples = new float[frameCount * audio.ChannelCount];
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(samples, frameCount);

    if (framesRead < frameCount)
    {
        Array.Resize(ref samples, framesRead * audio.ChannelCount);
    }

    return samples;
}

docs.title: 截取指定时间段
docs.text:
public float[] ExtractSegment(string path, float startSec, float durationSec)
{
    using var audio = new AudioAsset();
    audio.Load(path, SampleFormat.Float);

    long startFrame = (long)(startSec * audio.SampleRate);
    int frameCount = (int)(durationSec * audio.SampleRate);

    audio.Seek(startFrame);

    float[] buffer = new float[frameCount * audio.ChannelCount];
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, frameCount);

    if (framesRead < frameCount)
    {
        Array.Resize(ref buffer, framesRead * audio.ChannelCount);
    }

    return buffer;
}

docs.title: 自定义流指南
docs.text: 本指南介绍如何使用 IUniassetStream 接口，把图片或音频数据从任意自定义数据源接入 Uniasset。

docs.title: 适用场景
docs.text:
IUniassetStream 适合以下场景：

  • 资源来自自定义打包格式
  • 数据已经在内存中，不想落盘到临时文件
  • 资源需要先解密或解压，再交给 Uniasset
  • 资源来自 AssetBundle、数据库或网络缓存
  • 测试时需要可控的 Mock 数据源

docs.title: 接口定义
docs.text:
public interface IUniassetStream
{
    int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
    long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
}

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
int Read(Span<byte> buffer);

要求：

  • 将数据读取到 buffer
  • 返回实际读取的字节数
  • 到达末尾时返回 0

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);

要求：

  • 根据 origin 和 offset 移动当前位置
  • 返回新的绝对位置
  • 必须支持 Begin、Current 和 End

docs.title: SeekOrigin
docs.text:
public enum SeekOrigin
{
    Begin = 0,
    Current = 1,
    End = 2,
}

docs.title: 与 ImageAsset / AudioAsset 的配合方式
图片
docs.text:
ImageAsset 支持两种写法：

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(customStream);

或直接传入 System.IO.Stream：

using var image = new ImageAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");

image.LoadIO(fileStream);

docs.title: 音频
docs.text:
AudioAsset 只支持 IUniassetStream：

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(customStream);

如果你手里是 System.IO.Stream，需要手动包装：

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");

var stream = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);
audio.LoadIO(stream);

docs.title: 使用 StreamWrapper
docs.text:
StreamWrapper 是内置适配器，用于把 System.IO.Stream 转成 IUniassetStream。

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(wrapper);

使用限制

StreamWrapper 要求底层 Stream 同时满足：

  • 可读：CanRead == true
  • 可定位：CanSeek == true

docs.title: 最小可用实现
docs.text:
下面是一个基于 byte[] 的最小实现模板：

public sealed class MemoryStreamAdapter : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public MemoryStreamAdapter(byte[] data)
    {
        _data = data ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(data));
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _data.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: 从内存加载图片
docs.text:
byte[] imageBytes = File.ReadAllBytes("photo.png");
var stream = new MemoryStreamAdapter(imageBytes);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(stream);

Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: 从内存加载音频
docs.text:
byte[] audioBytes = File.ReadAllBytes("music.mp3");
var stream = new MemoryStreamAdapter(audioBytes);

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(stream);

AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: 从 AssetBundle 中读取
docs.text:
public sealed class AssetBundleStream : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public AssetBundleStream(AssetBundle bundle, string assetName)
    {
        var asset = bundle.LoadAsset<TextAsset>(assetName);
        if (asset == null) throw new ArgumentException("Asset not found.", nameof(assetName));
        _data = asset.bytes;
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _data.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: 读取加密数据
docs.text:
public sealed class EncryptedStream : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _encryptedData;
    private readonly byte[] _key;
    private int _position;

    public EncryptedStream(byte[] encryptedData, byte[] key)
    {
        _encryptedData = encryptedData ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(encryptedData));
        _key = key ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(key));
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _encryptedData.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < toRead; i++)
        {
            buffer[i] = (byte)(_encryptedData[_position + i] ^ _key[(_position + i) % _key.Length]);
        }

        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _encryptedData.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _encryptedData.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: 1. 始终支持随机定位
docs.text: 不要把 IUniassetStream 实现成“只能顺序读一次”的接口。Uniasset 依赖 Seek(...) 在不同位置反复读取数据。

docs.title: 2. 正确处理 EOF
docs.text: 读到末尾时返回 0，不要抛异常，也不要返回负数。

docs.title: 3. 允许负偏移
docs.text: Seek(-10, SeekOrigin.Current) 这样的调用是合法的，实现时要正确处理。

docs.title: 4. 返回绝对位置
docs.text: Seek(...) 的返回值应是新的绝对位置，而不是偏移量。

docs.title: 5. 注意资源释放
docs.text: 如果你的实现内部持有文件句柄、Socket、数据库游标或其他外部资源，应额外实现 IDisposable。

docs.title: Read 返回 0 后还能继续 Seek 吗？
docs.text: 可以。Read 返回 0 只表示当前位置已经没有更多数据，并不意味着流失效。

docs.title: 流长度必须提前知道吗？
docs.text: 不一定，但你的 Seek(0, SeekOrigin.End) 必须能够返回一个有效位置，否则依赖随机定位的读取逻辑会出问题。

docs.title: 可以在 Read 里边读边下载网络数据吗？
docs.text: 可以，但前提是你的实现仍然能满足 Seek(...) 的语义。对很多网络源来说，更实际的方式是先缓存到内存或临时文件，再通过 IUniassetStream 暴露给 Uniasset。

docs.title: 图片加载指南
docs.text: 本指南介绍如何使用 Uniasset.Image.ImageAsset 加载、处理并转换图片资源。

docs.title: 支持格式
docs.text:
Uniasset 当前支持以下图片格式：

格式 扩展名 说明 JPEG .jpg, .jpeg 有损压缩，适合照片 WebP .webp 支持有损和无损压缩 PNG .png 无损压缩，支持透明通道 BMP .bmp 兼容性好 TGA .tga 常用于游戏资源 PSD .psd Photoshop 源文件格式

docs.title: 从文件加载
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("Assets/Images/photo.png");

Debug.Log($"图片尺寸: {image.Width} x {image.Height}");
Debug.Log($"通道数: {image.ChannelCount}");

docs.title: 从字节数组加载
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();

byte[] data = File.ReadAllBytes("photo.png");
image.Load(data);

docs.title: 从流加载
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
using var stream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");

image.LoadIO(stream);

docs.title: 异步加载
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();

await image.LoadAsync("photo.png");

Note

当前异步加载仅提供 LoadAsync(string) 和 LoadAsync(byte[])。LoadIO(...) 没有异步重载。

docs.title: 解码时指定目标尺寸
docs.text:
加载图片时可以传入 expectedWidth 和 expectedHeight，在解码阶段直接输出目标尺寸，减少后续内存和处理开销：

image.Load("large_photo.png", expectedWidth: 256, expectedHeight: 256);

如果不需要指定尺寸，传 0 即可：

image.Load("photo.png", expectedWidth: 0, expectedHeight: 0);

Warning

expectedWidth 和 expectedHeight 不能小于 0，否则会抛出 ArgumentOutOfRangeException。

docs.title: 裁剪
docs.text: image.Crop(x: 100, y: 100, width: 200, height: 200);

docs.title: 异步裁剪
docs.text: await image.CropAsync(100, 100, 200, 200);

docs.title: 批量裁剪
docs.text:
适合从图集里批量提取子图：

var crops = new CropOptions[]
{
    new CropOptions(0, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(32, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(64, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(96, 0, 32, 32),
};

ImageAsset[] frames = image.CropMultiple(crops);

docs.title: 异步批量裁剪
docs.text: ImageAsset[] frames = await image.CropMultipleAsync(crops);

docs.title: 缩放
docs.text: image.Resize(256, 256);

docs.title: 异步缩放
docs.text: await image.ResizeAsync(256, 256);

docs.title: 同步转换
docs.text: Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: 异步转换
docs.text: Texture2D texture = await image.ToTexture2DAsync();

docs.title: 参数说明
docs.text:
Texture2D ToTexture2D(
    bool mipmap = false,
    bool linear = true,
    bool noLongerReadable = true
);
参数 说明 mipmap 是否生成 mipmap linear 是否按线性色彩空间创建纹理 noLongerReadable 创建后是否让纹理变为不可读

Note

ToTexture2D() 和 ToTexture2DAsync() 仅支持通道数为 3 或 4 的图片数据。

docs.title: 克隆
docs.text:
ImageAsset copy = image.Clone();

克隆后得到新的 ImageAsset 实例，后续处理互不影响。

docs.title: 使用 using
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: 卸载已加载数据
docs.text:
image.Unload();

Unload() 会释放当前图片内容，但保留 ImageAsset 对象本身，之后仍可继续 Load(...)。

docs.title: 加载 UI 图片
docs.text:
public class ImageLoader : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private RawImage _rawImage;

    private ImageAsset _imageAsset;

    private async void Start()
    {
        _imageAsset = new ImageAsset();
        await _imageAsset.LoadAsync("Assets/UI/background.png");
        _rawImage.texture = await _imageAsset.ToTexture2DAsync();
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        _imageAsset?.Dispose();
    }
}

docs.title: 读取头像并裁剪为正方形
docs.text:
public async Task<Texture2D> LoadAvatar(string path, int size)
{
    using var image = new ImageAsset();
    await image.LoadAsync(path);

    int minDim = Math.Min(image.Width, image.Height);
    int x = (image.Width - minDim) / 2;
    int y = (image.Height - minDim) / 2;

    image.Crop(x, y, minDim, minDim);
    image.Resize(size, size);

    return await image.ToTexture2DAsync();
}

docs.title: 切分图集
docs.text:
public async Task<Texture2D[]> LoadSpriteSheet(string path, int spriteWidth, int spriteHeight)
{
    using var sheet = new ImageAsset();
    await sheet.LoadAsync(path);

    int cols = sheet.Width / spriteWidth;
    int rows = sheet.Height / spriteHeight;

    var crops = new CropOptions[cols * rows];
    for (int y = 0; y < rows; y++)
    {
        for (int x = 0; x < cols; x++)
        {
            crops[y * cols + x] = new CropOptions(
                x * spriteWidth,
                y * spriteHeight,
                spriteWidth,
                spriteHeight
            );
        }
    }

    ImageAsset[] sprites = sheet.CropMultiple(crops);
    try
    {
        var textures = new Texture2D[sprites.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < sprites.Length; i++)
        {
            textures[i] = sprites[i].ToTexture2D();
        }

        return textures;
    }
    finally
    {
        foreach (var sprite in sprites)
        {
            sprite.Dispose();
        }
    }
}

docs.title: Uniasset
docs.text:
1

C# SDK

A fully asynchronous C# API layer with high-level abstractions such as ImageAsset and AudioAsset.

2

P/Invoke FFI

A lightweight interop layer that talks directly to native code with no extra serialization overhead.

3

Rust Native Library

A high-performance Rust core responsible for decoding, processing, and memory management across platforms.

Load and process an image

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
await image.LoadAsync("photo.png");

// Crop and resize
await image.CropAsync(0, 0, 256, 256);
await image.ResizeAsync(128, 128);

// Convert to Texture2D
Texture2D texture = await image.ToTexture2DAsync();

Load and play audio

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");

// Inspect audio metadata
Debug.Log($"Sample rate: {audio.SampleRate} Hz");
Debug.Log($"Channels: {audio.ChannelCount}");

// Convert to AudioClip
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: Uniasset
docs.text:
High-performance external asset loading for Unity

Built on native Rust libraries, Uniasset brings asynchronous and efficient image and audio loading to Unity projects.

Get Started GitHub

MIT C# + Rust

docs.title: Why Unity asset loading is painful
docs.text: External asset loading in Unity often runs into the same bottlenecks. Uniasset is designed to remove them.

docs.title: Slow processing
docs.text: Cropping or resizing textures usually means multiple SetPixels passes, extra copies, and format conversions.

docs.title: Limited format support
docs.text: Unity does not handle formats like WebP or FLAC well without extra tooling.

docs.title: Inflexible data sources
docs.text: Loading from network streams, encrypted packages, or custom storage layers is awkward.

docs.title: Performance first
docs.text: The core is written in Rust and exposed through P/Invoke FFI, making full use of native performance and SIMD-friendly paths.

docs.title: Async by default
docs.text: Expensive operations expose async/await APIs that fit naturally into Unity coroutines and Tasks without blocking the main thread.

docs.title: Multi-format images
docs.text: Supports JPEG, WebP, PNG, BMP, TGA, PSD, with built-in cropping and resizing.

docs.title: Multi-format audio
docs.text: Covers MP3, FLAC, WAV, PCM, Vorbis, OGG, and AAC decoding.

docs.title: Custom data sources
docs.text: Implement IUniassetStream to load from any source: network streams, encrypted bundles, AssetBundles, or memory caches.

docs.title: One-step integration
docs.text: Download uniasset-unity-scripts.zip from Releases, then use the editor menu to fetch and configure native libraries.

docs.title: Images
docs.text:
• JPEG
  • WebP (first frame only)
  • PNG
  • BMP
  • TGA
  • PSD
  • GIF (first frame only)

docs.title: Audio
docs.text:
• MP3
  • FLAC
  • WAV
  • Vorbis (OGG)
  • AAC

docs.title: Install the package
docs.text: Download uniasset-unity-scripts.zip from Releases and extract it into your project.

docs.title: Install native libraries
docs.text:
In the Unity Editor, run:

Tools > Uniasset > Download Native Libraries
Tools > Uniasset > Configure Native Libraries

docs.title: Start loading assets
docs.text:
Import the namespace and begin loading:

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
await image.LoadAsync("assets/photo.png");

docs.text:
using Uniasset;

docs.title: Asynchronous APIs
docs.text:
All expensive operations also provide async variants to avoid blocking Unity's main thread:

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

var image = new ImageAsset();

// Load asynchronously
await image.LoadAsync("path/to/image.png");

// Crop asynchronously
await image.CropAsync(0, 0, 100, 100);

// Resize asynchronously

docs.title: API Reference
docs.text: This section documents the current public C# API in Unity/Uniasset/. It focuses on the high-level wrappers and excludes Unsafe / Interop types.

docs.title: Namespace overview
docs.text: Namespace Description Uniasset Core stream interfaces and adapters Uniasset.Image Image-related types Uniasset.Audio Audio-related types

docs.title: ImageAsset
docs.text:
An image asset wrapper that can load encoded image data from files, memory, or streams, then crop, resize, clone, and convert it to Texture2D.

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: AudioAsset
docs.text:
An audio asset wrapper that can load audio from files, memory, or custom streams, then expose PCM reads, seeking, and AudioClip conversion.

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

var crops = new CropOptions[]

    new CropOptions(100, 0, 100, 100),
};

docs.text:
An enum that selects the resize filter, including Nearest, Box, Lanczos3, and Gaussian.

Thread safety

This method is not thread-safe. Use it only when the asset is accessed from a single thread. Use Seek in concurrent scenarios.

public AudioClip ToAudioClip(string name = "created_from_uniasset", bool stream = true)

Converts the audio into a Unity AudioClip.

Parameter Type Default Description name string "created_from_uniasset" AudioClip name stream bool true Whether to create a streaming clip

Streaming (stream = true):

  • Audio data is pulled on demand during playback
  • Lower memory usage, suitable for long clips

Fully loaded (stream = false):

  • Unity pulls the complete audio data during clip creation
  • Better for short sound effects or repeated playback
AudioClip bgm = audio.ToAudioClip("BGM", stream: true);
AudioClip sfx = audio.ToAudioClip("Explosion", stream: false);

docs.text: Uniasset.IUniassetStream abstracts a readable and seekable data source. Both ImageAsset.LoadIO(...) and AudioAsset.LoadIO(...) depend on it.

docs.title: Definition

namespace Uniasset
{
    public interface IUniassetStream
    {
        int Read(Span<byte> buffer);

}

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
int Read(Span<byte> buffer);

Reads data from the stream into the destination buffer.

Parameter Type Description buffer Span<byte> Destination buffer

Returns the number of bytes actually read. Returning 0 means EOF.

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);

Moves the read position.

Parameter Type Description offset long Offset origin SeekOrigin Origin of the offset

Returns the new absolute position.

docs.title: SeekOrigin
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset
{
    public enum SeekOrigin
    {
        Begin = 0,
        Current = 1,
        End = 2
    }
}
Member Value Description Begin 0 Offset from the start of the stream Current 1 Offset from the current position End 2 Offset from the end of the stream

docs.title: Custom implementations
docs.text:
You can implement IUniassetStream for in-memory data, packaged resources, or any custom storage layer:

public class MemoryStreamAdapter : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public MemoryStreamAdapter(byte[] data)
    {
        _data = data;
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        _position = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => (int)offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + (int)offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + (int)offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• ImageAsset provides both LoadIO(IUniassetStream) and LoadIO(Stream).
  • AudioAsset only provides LoadIO(IUniassetStream).
  • Custom implementations must support both sequential reads and random access.

docs.title: ResizeFilter
docs.text: Uniasset.Image.ResizeFilter selects the filtering algorithm used when resizing images.

docs.title: Definition
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Image
{
    public enum ResizeFilter : uint
    {
        Nearest = 0,
        Box = 1,
        Lanczos3 = 2,
        Gaussian = 3,
    }
}

docs.title: Members
docs.text: Member Value Description Nearest 0 Nearest-neighbor interpolation; fastest and good for pixel art Box 1 Box filter; useful for downscaling Lanczos3 2 Lanczos 3-lobe interpolation; highest quality Gaussian 3 Gaussian filter with smoother output

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
image.Resize(256, 256, ResizeFilter.Lanczos3);

If omitted, ResizeFilter.Nearest is used by default.

docs.title: SampleFormat
docs.text: Uniasset.Audio.SampleFormat specifies the decoded audio sample format.

docs.title: Definition
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset.Audio
{
    public enum SampleFormat : byte
    {
        Float = 0,
        Int16 = 1
    }
}

docs.title: Members
docs.text: Member Value Description Float 0 32-bit floating-point samples, matching Read<float>(...) Int16 1 16-bit integer samples, matching Read<short>(...)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio1 = new AudioAsset();
audio1.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);
float[] floatBuffer = new float[1024];
audio1.Read<float>(floatBuffer, 1024);

using var audio2 = new AudioAsset();
audio2.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Int16);
short[] shortBuffer = new short[1024];
audio2.Read<short>(shortBuffer, 1024);

docs.title: Recommendations
docs.text: Scenario Recommended format General use Float Memory-constrained workloads Int16 Audio processing Float Integer PCM workflows Int16

docs.title: StreamWrapper
docs.text: Uniasset.StreamWrapper is the built-in IUniassetStream implementation for adapting System.IO.Stream.

docs.title: Definition
docs.text:
namespace Uniasset
{
    public sealed class StreamWrapper : IUniassetStream
    {
        public StreamWrapper(Stream stream);
        public int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
        public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
    }
}

docs.title: Constructor
docs.text:
public StreamWrapper(Stream stream)
Parameter Type Description stream Stream The stream to wrap; it must be readable and seekable

If stream is null, the constructor throws ArgumentNullException. If it is not readable or not seekable, it throws ArgumentException.

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)

Reads data from the underlying Stream.

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)

Maps Uniasset's SeekOrigin to System.IO.SeekOrigin and performs the seek on the underlying stream.

docs.title: Wrap a Stream manually
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(wrapper);

docs.title: Use with AudioAsset
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(wrapper);

Convenience overload on ImageAsset

ImageAsset.LoadIO(Stream) creates StreamWrapper internally, so you can pass System.IO.Stream directly when loading images:

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
image.LoadIO(fileStream);

docs.title: Good fit when
docs.text:
• You already have a FileStream, MemoryStream, or another .NET Stream
  • You want to reuse existing stream logic instead of writing IUniassetStream
  • You need to connect a standard .NET stream to AudioAsset.LoadIO(...)

docs.title: Audio Loading Guide
docs.text: This guide explains how to use Uniasset.Audio.AudioAsset to load audio, read PCM data, and convert it to a Unity AudioClip.

docs.title: Supported formats
docs.text:
Uniasset currently supports:

Format Extensions Notes MP3 .mp3 Common lossy format FLAC .flac Lossless compression WAV .wav Common uncompressed container PCM .pcm Raw PCM data Vorbis — Vorbis-encoded audio OGG .ogg Common Vorbis container AAC .aac, .m4a Common lossy format

docs.title: Load from file
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("Assets/Audio/bgm.mp3");

Debug.Log($"Sample rate: {audio.SampleRate} Hz");
Debug.Log($"Channels: {audio.ChannelCount}");
Debug.Log($"Frame count: {audio.FrameCount}");

docs.title: Load from a byte array
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();

byte[] data = File.ReadAllBytes("sound.wav");
audio.Load(data);

docs.title: Load from a custom stream
docs.text:
using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Audio;

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");
var stream = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

audio.LoadIO(stream);

Note

AudioAsset currently exposes LoadIO(IUniassetStream) only. There is no LoadIO(Stream) convenience overload.

docs.title: Sample format
docs.text:
You can choose the output sample format during load:

audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);
audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Int16);

Recommended defaults:

  • Use SampleFormat.Float when handing data to Unity or doing floating-point processing
  • Use SampleFormat.Int16 when memory usage matters or when you need 16-bit PCM directly

See SampleFormat API Reference for details.

docs.title: Streaming playback
docs.text:
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip("BGM", stream: true);
audioSource.clip = clip;
audioSource.Play();

Good for:

  • Background music
  • Long-form audio
  • Lower one-shot memory usage

docs.title: Fully loaded playback
docs.text:
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip("Explosion", stream: false);

Good for:

  • Short sound effects
  • Frequently repeated clips

docs.title: Basic read
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.flac", SampleFormat.Float);

float[] buffer = new float[1024 * audio.ChannelCount];
int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, 1024);

docs.title: Read the whole file in chunks
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3", SampleFormat.Float);

int chunkSize = 4096;
float[] buffer = new float[chunkSize * audio.ChannelCount];
long totalFrames = 0;

while (true)
{
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, chunkSize);
    if (framesRead == 0) break;

    totalFrames += framesRead;
}

Debug.Log($"Read {totalFrames} frames in total");

docs.title: Read with Int16
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("sound.wav", SampleFormat.Int16);

short[] buffer = new short[1024 * audio.ChannelCount];
int framesRead = audio.Read<short>(buffer, 1024);

Warning

The type parameter T in Read<T>(...) must match the selected SampleFormat: SampleFormat.Float -> float, SampleFormat.Int16 -> short.

docs.title: Get the current position
docs.text:
long currentFrame = audio.Tell();
Debug.Log($"Current frame: {currentFrame} / {audio.FrameCount}");

docs.title: Seek to a frame
docs.text:
audio.Seek(1000);
audio.Seek(0);

docs.title: Convert between seconds and frames
docs.text:
float seconds = (float)audio.Tell() / audio.SampleRate;

long frame = (long)(10.5f * audio.SampleRate);
audio.Seek(frame);

docs.title: Use using
docs.text:
using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.Load("music.mp3");
AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: Unload loaded data
docs.text:
audio.Unload();

Unload() clears the current audio data while keeping the instance reusable.

docs.title: Background music player
docs.text:
public class BGMPlayer : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private AudioSource _audioSource;

    private AudioAsset _audioAsset;

    public void PlayBGM(string path)
    {
        StopBGM();

        _audioAsset = new AudioAsset();
        _audioAsset.Load(path);

        _audioSource.clip = _audioAsset.ToAudioClip("BGM", stream: true);
        _audioSource.loop = true;
        _audioSource.Play();
    }

    public void StopBGM()
    {
        _audioSource.Stop();
        _audioSource.clip = null;
        _audioAsset?.Dispose();
        _audioAsset = null;
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        StopBGM();
    }
}

docs.title: Sound-effect cache
docs.text:
public class SFXManager : MonoBehaviour
{
    private readonly Dictionary<string, AudioClip> _cache = new();

    public AudioClip LoadSFX(string path)
    {
        if (_cache.TryGetValue(path, out var cached))
            return cached;

        using var audio = new AudioAsset();
        audio.Load(path);

        var clip = audio.ToAudioClip(Path.GetFileName(path), stream: false);
        _cache[path] = clip;
        return clip;
    }
}

docs.title: Waveform preview
docs.text:
public float[] ReadWaveform(string path, int frameCount)
{
    using var audio = new AudioAsset();
    audio.Load(path, SampleFormat.Float);

    float[] samples = new float[frameCount * audio.ChannelCount];
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(samples, frameCount);

    if (framesRead < frameCount)
    {
        Array.Resize(ref samples, framesRead * audio.ChannelCount);
    }

    return samples;
}

docs.title: Extract a time range
docs.text:
public float[] ExtractSegment(string path, float startSec, float durationSec)
{
    using var audio = new AudioAsset();
    audio.Load(path, SampleFormat.Float);

    long startFrame = (long)(startSec * audio.SampleRate);
    int frameCount = (int)(durationSec * audio.SampleRate);

    audio.Seek(startFrame);

    float[] buffer = new float[frameCount * audio.ChannelCount];
    int framesRead = audio.Read<float>(buffer, frameCount);

    if (framesRead < frameCount)
    {
        Array.Resize(ref buffer, framesRead * audio.ChannelCount);
    }

    return buffer;
}

docs.title: Custom Streams Guide
docs.text: This guide shows how to use IUniassetStream to feed image or audio data into Uniasset from arbitrary data sources.

docs.title: When to use it
docs.text:
IUniassetStream is useful when:

  • Assets come from a custom package format
  • Data is already in memory and you do not want a temporary file
  • Assets need to be decrypted or decompressed before decoding
  • Data comes from an AssetBundle, database, or network cache
  • Tests need a controllable mock data source

docs.title: Interface definition
docs.text:
public interface IUniassetStream
{
    int Read(Span<byte> buffer);
    long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);
}

docs.title: Read
docs.text:
int Read(Span<byte> buffer);

Requirements:

  • Fill buffer with data
  • Return the number of bytes actually read
  • Return 0 on EOF

docs.title: Seek
docs.text:
long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin);

Requirements:

  • Move the current position based on origin and offset
  • Return the new absolute position
  • Support Begin, Current, and End

docs.title: SeekOrigin
docs.text:
public enum SeekOrigin
{
    Begin = 0,
    Current = 1,
    End = 2,
}

docs.title: Images
docs.text:
ImageAsset supports both forms:

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(customStream);

Or pass a System.IO.Stream directly:

using var image = new ImageAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");

image.LoadIO(fileStream);

docs.title: Audio
docs.text:
AudioAsset only supports IUniassetStream:

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(customStream);

If you start from System.IO.Stream, wrap it first:

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("music.flac");

var stream = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);
audio.LoadIO(stream);

docs.title: Using StreamWrapper
docs.text:
StreamWrapper is the built-in adapter that converts System.IO.Stream into IUniassetStream.

using Uniasset;
using Uniasset.Image;

using var fileStream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");
var wrapper = new StreamWrapper(fileStream);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(wrapper);

Restrictions

StreamWrapper requires the underlying Stream to be:

  • Readable: CanRead == true
  • Seekable: CanSeek == true

docs.title: Minimal implementation
docs.text:
Here is a minimal byte[]-backed implementation:

public sealed class MemoryStreamAdapter : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public MemoryStreamAdapter(byte[] data)
    {
        _data = data ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(data));
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _data.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: Load an image from memory
docs.text:
byte[] imageBytes = File.ReadAllBytes("photo.png");
var stream = new MemoryStreamAdapter(imageBytes);

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.LoadIO(stream);

Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: Load audio from memory
docs.text:
byte[] audioBytes = File.ReadAllBytes("music.mp3");
var stream = new MemoryStreamAdapter(audioBytes);

using var audio = new AudioAsset();
audio.LoadIO(stream);

AudioClip clip = audio.ToAudioClip();

docs.title: Read from an AssetBundle
docs.text:
public sealed class AssetBundleStream : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _data;
    private int _position;

    public AssetBundleStream(AssetBundle bundle, string assetName)
    {
        var asset = bundle.LoadAsset<TextAsset>(assetName);
        if (asset == null) throw new ArgumentException("Asset not found.", nameof(assetName));
        _data = asset.bytes;
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _data.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        _data.AsSpan(_position, toRead).CopyTo(buffer);
        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _data.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _data.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: Read encrypted data
docs.text:
public sealed class EncryptedStream : IUniassetStream
{
    private readonly byte[] _encryptedData;
    private readonly byte[] _key;
    private int _position;

    public EncryptedStream(byte[] encryptedData, byte[] key)
    {
        _encryptedData = encryptedData ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(encryptedData));
        _key = key ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(key));
    }

    public int Read(Span<byte> buffer)
    {
        int available = _encryptedData.Length - _position;
        int toRead = Math.Min(buffer.Length, available);
        if (toRead <= 0) return 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < toRead; i++)
        {
            buffer[i] = (byte)(_encryptedData[_position + i] ^ _key[(_position + i) % _key.Length]);
        }

        _position += toRead;
        return toRead;
    }

    public long Seek(long offset, SeekOrigin origin)
    {
        long newPosition = origin switch
        {
            SeekOrigin.Begin => offset,
            SeekOrigin.Current => _position + offset,
            SeekOrigin.End => _encryptedData.Length + offset,
            _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(origin))
        };

        _position = (int)Math.Clamp(newPosition, 0, _encryptedData.Length);
        return _position;
    }
}

docs.title: 1. Always support random access
docs.text: Do not implement IUniassetStream as a one-pass forward-only reader. Uniasset relies on Seek(...) to revisit arbitrary positions.

docs.title: 2. Handle EOF correctly
docs.text: Return 0 at EOF. Do not throw and do not return negative values.

docs.title: 3. Allow negative offsets
docs.text: Calls such as Seek(-10, SeekOrigin.Current) are valid and should work correctly.

docs.title: 4. Return absolute positions
docs.text: Seek(...) should return the new absolute position, not the applied offset.

docs.title: 5. Clean up external resources
docs.text: If your implementation owns file handles, sockets, DB cursors, or other external resources, it should also implement IDisposable.

docs.title: Can I still Seek after Read returns 0?
docs.text: Yes. Read == 0 only means the current position is at EOF; it does not invalidate the stream.

docs.title: Do I need to know the total length in advance?
docs.text: Not necessarily, but Seek(0, SeekOrigin.End) must still return a valid position, or random-access consumers may fail.

docs.title: Can Read download data lazily from the network?
docs.text: Yes, but only if your implementation still preserves Seek(...) semantics. In practice, caching to memory or a temporary file is usually simpler.

docs.title: Image Loading Guide
docs.text: This guide covers how to use Uniasset.Image.ImageAsset to load, process, and convert image assets.

docs.title: Supported formats
docs.text:
Uniasset currently supports:

Format Extensions Notes JPEG .jpg, .jpeg Lossy compression, good for photos WebP .webp Supports lossy and lossless compression PNG .png Lossless compression with alpha BMP .bmp Broad compatibility TGA .tga Common in game pipelines PSD .psd Photoshop source files

docs.title: Load from file
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("Assets/Images/photo.png");

Debug.Log($"Image size: {image.Width} x {image.Height}");
Debug.Log($"Channels: {image.ChannelCount}");

docs.title: Load from a byte array
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();

byte[] data = File.ReadAllBytes("photo.png");
image.Load(data);

docs.title: Load from a stream
docs.text:
using Uniasset.Image;

using var image = new ImageAsset();
using var stream = File.OpenRead("photo.png");

image.LoadIO(stream);

docs.title: Load asynchronously
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();

await image.LoadAsync("photo.png");

Note

Asynchronous loading currently exists for LoadAsync(string) and LoadAsync(byte[]). LoadIO(...) has no async overload in this guide's scope.

docs.title: Decode directly to a target size
docs.text:
You can pass expectedWidth and expectedHeight during decode to reduce later memory and processing overhead:

image.Load("large_photo.png", expectedWidth: 256, expectedHeight: 256);

If you do not need resize-on-decode, pass 0:

image.Load("photo.png", expectedWidth: 0, expectedHeight: 0);

Warning

expectedWidth and expectedHeight must not be negative, or ArgumentOutOfRangeException will be thrown.

docs.title: Crop
docs.text: image.Crop(x: 100, y: 100, width: 200, height: 200);

docs.title: Crop asynchronously
docs.text: await image.CropAsync(100, 100, 200, 200);

docs.title: Batch crop
docs.text:
Useful for extracting multiple sprites from an atlas:

var crops = new CropOptions[]
{
    new CropOptions(0, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(32, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(64, 0, 32, 32),
    new CropOptions(96, 0, 32, 32),
};

ImageAsset[] frames = image.CropMultiple(crops);

docs.title: Batch crop asynchronously
docs.text: ImageAsset[] frames = await image.CropMultipleAsync(crops);

docs.title: Resize
docs.text: image.Resize(256, 256);

docs.title: Resize asynchronously
docs.text: await image.ResizeAsync(256, 256);

docs.title: Synchronous conversion
docs.text: Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: Asynchronous conversion
docs.text: Texture2D texture = await image.ToTexture2DAsync();

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text:
Texture2D ToTexture2D(
    bool mipmap = false,
    bool linear = true,
    bool noLongerReadable = true
);
Parameter Description mipmap Whether to generate mipmaps linear Whether to create the texture in linear color space noLongerReadable Whether to make the texture unreadable after upload

Note

ToTexture2D() and ToTexture2DAsync() only support image data with 3 or 4 channels.

docs.title: Clone
docs.text:
ImageAsset copy = image.Clone();

This returns a new ImageAsset instance that can be processed independently.

docs.title: Use using
docs.text:
using var image = new ImageAsset();
image.Load("photo.png");
Texture2D texture = image.ToTexture2D();

docs.title: Unload loaded data
docs.text:
image.Unload();

Unload() releases the current image content but keeps the ImageAsset instance reusable.

docs.title: Load a UI image
docs.text:
public class ImageLoader : MonoBehaviour
{
    [SerializeField] private RawImage _rawImage;

    private ImageAsset _imageAsset;

    private async void Start()
    {
        _imageAsset = new ImageAsset();
        await _imageAsset.LoadAsync("Assets/UI/background.png");
        _rawImage.texture = await _imageAsset.ToTexture2DAsync();
    }

    private void OnDestroy()
    {
        _imageAsset?.Dispose();
    }
}

docs.title: Load and square-crop an avatar
docs.text:
public async Task<Texture2D> LoadAvatar(string path, int size)
{
    using var image = new ImageAsset();
    await image.LoadAsync(path);

    int minDim = Math.Min(image.Width, image.Height);
    int x = (image.Width - minDim) / 2;
    int y = (image.Height - minDim) / 2;

    image.Crop(x, y, minDim, minDim);
    image.Resize(size, size);

    return await image.ToTexture2DAsync();
}

docs.title: Slice a sprite sheet
docs.text:
public async Task<Texture2D[]> LoadSpriteSheet(string path, int spriteWidth, int spriteHeight)
{
    using var sheet = new ImageAsset();
    await sheet.LoadAsync(path);

    int cols = sheet.Width / spriteWidth;
    int rows = sheet.Height / spriteHeight;

    var crops = new CropOptions[cols * rows];
    for (int y = 0; y < rows; y++)
    {
        for (int x = 0; x < cols; x++)
        {
            crops[y * cols + x] = new CropOptions(
                x * spriteWidth,
                y * spriteHeight,
                spriteWidth,
                spriteHeight
            );
        }
    }

    ImageAsset[] sprites = sheet.CropMultiple(crops);
    try
    {
        var textures = new Texture2D[sprites.Length];
        for (int i = 0; i < sprites.Length; i++)
        {
            textures[i] = sprites[i].ToTexture2D();
        }

        return textures;
    }
    finally
    {
        foreach (var sprite in sprites)
        {
            sprite.Dispose();
        }
    }
}
